name: Sunflower Bread (Radis)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, vegetable oil, honey, and salt.
3. Mix in the oats, whole wheat flour, bread flour, and yeast until well combined.
4. Stir in the sunflower seeds and raisins.
5. Pour the mixture into your bread pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
7. Allow the bread to cool completely before slicing and serving.
